# yttoc — YouTube Xscript to Structured Table of Contents

> nbdev-based Python CLI that downloads YouTube captions (ja preferred, en fallback),
> parses SRT into normalized xscript segments, and generates structured ToC and summaries
> via LLM. Converts video transcripts into searchable, hierarchical knowledge assets.

<!-- BEGIN AUTO -->
## Files

- [README.md](README.md): Auto-generated from nbs/index.ipynb — install, CLI reference, course maps, and fzf search
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Claude Code guidance — project overview, xscript terminology, and nbdev conventions
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Repo-specific additions to global AGENTS.md — nbdev structure, build commands, and notebook→module map
- [docs/implementation-plan.md](docs/implementation-plan.md): Phased roadmap from manual baseline through RAG, with prompt templates and module map
<!-- END AUTO -->
